levels.name: Global Graph Summary
levels.description: Complete AUGMANITAI framework across all domains and interaction types
levels.content:
# AUGMANITAI: Complete Framework Summary

AUGMANITAI is a comprehensive terminology framework for understanding human-AI interaction, knowledge synthesis, and collaborative cognitive processes. The framework comprises 25 core concepts organized into five interconnected communities addressing linguistic, meta-cognitive, knowledge-synthesis, interaction, and organizational dimensions of human-AI collaboration.

## Core Finding
The framework demonstrates that sustained human-AI collaboration produces emergent phenomena not present in either party alone. These phenomena include shared linguistic conventions (idiolects), meta-cognitive alignment, collaborative knowledge structures, and qualitative transformations in dialogue quality at critical thresholds.

## Key Relationships
- Linguistic foundations (SLE, DSM) enable all higher-order collaboration
- Meta-cognitive alignment (CCR, MCA) is a critical quality constraint
- Knowledge synthesis (RKE, COD) is the productive output
- Interaction dynamics (TCT, CSF) determine quality and flow
- Organizational context (AIF, ARS) determines institutional impact

## Safety Implications
- Epistemic confidence variance creates systematic overconfidence
- Intent inference is high-risk without explicit verification
- Cognitive fatigue is invisible but dramatically degrades quality
- Asymmetric risk sharing requires explicit governance
- Implicit knowledge frames cause hidden misalignments

clusters.summary: How linguistic patterns and cognitive alignment co-evolve. Linguistic foundations enable meta-cognitive processes; cognitive processes maintain and refine linguistic patterns.
clusters.key_insight: Linguistic and cognitive processes are inseparable. Semantic drift sensitivity requires meta-cognitive awareness; meta-cognitive alignment is expressed through shared linguistic conventions.

clusters.summary: How knowledge synthesis processes unfold through dialogue interaction. Interaction dynamics create the conditions under which knowledge synthesis occurs; knowledge synthesis gives purpose to interaction.
clusters.key_insight: Quality dialogue and productive knowledge synthesis are mutually enabling. Good interaction dynamics create conditions for deep knowledge work; knowledge work provides motivation for quality interaction.

clusters.summary: How individual dialogue quality translates into organizational impact. Bridges between dialogue-level phenomena and institutional constraints.
clusters.key_insight: High-quality dialogue means little without effective institutional integration. Organizational context is not a constraint to overcome but a dimension to navigate explicitly.

subclusters.name: Linguistic Foundation Layer
subclusters.role: Provides stable linguistic ground for all other interaction
subclusters.mechanism: Symbiotic linguistic evolution creates shared conventions; domain-specific metalanguage enables abstraction; semantic drift sensitivity prevents degradation

subclusters.name: Meta-Cognitive Quality Layer
subclusters.role: Maintains dialogue quality and prevents misalignment
subclusters.mechanism: Cognitive resonance establishes baseline alignment; mutual context awareness maintains alignment; cognitive intimacy enables depth; intent recognition enables proactivity; fatigue detection prevents degradation

subclusters.name: Knowledge Productive Layer
subclusters.role: Enables actual knowledge work and learning
subclusters.mechanism: Recursive expansion deepens structure; ontology development formalizes understanding; reasoning artifacts make thinking explicit; transparency enables verification; temporal anchoring preserves history

subclusters.name: Dialogue Dynamic Layer
subclusters.role: Governs flow, quality, and emergent properties of dialogue
subclusters.mechanism: Personality creates safety; protocol evolution optimizes; threshold transformation enables qualitative shifts; sensemaking organizes content; convergent-divergent questioning provides rhythm

subclusters.name: Institutional Reality Layer
subclusters.role: Translates dialogue quality into organizational action
subclusters.mechanism: Institutional fluency enables organizational operation; risk sharing clarity prevents accountability gaps; extended context awareness maintains organizational synchronization
